name: Telamon Corporation - Raleigh Branch
description_short: Unable to verify — website returned 403 Forbidden error. Telamon Corporation's Raleigh branch cannot be assessed based on current web access.
description_long: Telamon Corporation operates a Raleigh branch with an official website at telamon.org. However, the website is currently inaccessible, returning a 403 Forbidden error that prevents verification of services, credentials, or operational details. Without access to website content, company literature, or service descriptions, it is impossible to confirm whether this entity operates as a non-profit credit counselor, HUD-approved housing counselor, NFCC-certified advisor, or provides other financial assistance services. The current categorization as 'free-help' suggests the organization may provide free or low-cost financial counseling, but this cannot be confirmed. Prospective consumers should contact the organization directly via phone or in-person at their Raleigh location to verify services, nonprofit status, accreditation, and credentials before engaging. The website access issue prevents assessment of transparency, service scope, and consumer-facing information typically used to evaluate financial assistance organizations.
cons: Website is completely inaccessible (403 Forbidden error) — prevents verification of services and credentials
No publicly available web content to confirm nonprofit status, NFCC certification, or HUD approval
Inability to review service offerings, fees, counselor qualifications, or service areas online
No accessible information to verify business legitimacy or operational transparency
diagnosis: Cannot recommend or assess without web access. Contact Telamon Corporation directly to verify it is a legitimate free-help organization before proceeding. The 403 error indicates either a technical issue or access restriction that prevents consumer due diligence.
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
